hero.description: Horizon Tech ke k'hamphani ea theknoloji ea lefats'e e thehiloeng Sarajevo, e fanang ka tharollo ea software ea morao-rao ho likhoebo lik'honthinenteng tse tharo.

mission.title: Mission
mission.description: Re thusa mekhatlo ho fetola mehopolo e meholo hore e be lihlahisoa tse tšepahalang tsa dijithale tse hlahisang boleng ba khoebo bo ka lekanngoang.
points: Hokahanya phano ea theknoloji le liphetho tse hlakileng tsa khoebo.
Theha litsamaiso tsa nako e telele tse lulang li bolokiloe ha lihlopha li ntse li hōla.
Sebelisana haufi-ufi le bankakarolo ho tloha ho leano ho isa ts'ebetsong.

expertise.title: Tsebo
expertise.description: Lihlopha tsa rona tse ngata li kopanya botebo ba boenjiniere le mohopolo oa sehlahisoa ho pholletsa le mekotla ea mahlale a morao-rao.
points: Boenjiniere ba webo le sethala sa khoebo.
Meralo ea leru, boiketsetso ba DevOps, le meralo ea motheo e tsitsitseng.
Applied AI / ML, tshebetso ea data, le lihlahisoa tse lumelletsoeng ke IoT.

approach.title: Mokhoa
approach.description: Re etsa ka mohlala o hlakileng, o iterative o bolokang phano e boleloa esale pele ha e ntse e fokotsa kotsi ea sehlahisoa.
points: Discover: hlalosa sebaka, lintho tse tlang pele le metrics ea katleho kapele.
Kaho: Sekepe ka li-increments tse shebiloeng ka li-loops tse tsoelang pele tsa maikutlo.
Ntlafatsa: lekola liphetho le ho ntlafatsa ts'ebetso ha nako e ntse e tsamaea.

cta.title: Na u se u itokiselitse ho fetola khoebo ea hau?
cta.description: Ikopanye le lethathamo le ntseng le hola la lik'hamphani tse tšepang Horizon Tech ho fana ka tharollo e ncha le liphetho tse ikhethang.

hero.title: Iteanye le rona
hero.description: Na u na le projeke ka kelellong? Re ka thabela ho utloa ho tsoa ho uena. Ikopanye le rona ho buisana ka hore na re ka thusa joang ho tlisa mehopolo ea hau bophelong.

booking.title: Book a Seboka
booking.description: Etsa mohala oa mahala oa metsotso e 30

email.title: Imeile
email.description: Re romelle lengolo-tsoibila nako efe kapa efe

response.title: Nako ea Karabelo
response.description: Ka tloaelo re arabela ka hare

form.title: Re romelle molaetsa
form.success: Kea le leboha ka molaetsa oa hau. Re tla khutlela ho uena nakong ea lihora tse 24-48.
form.error: Ho na le ho hong ho sa tsamaeeng hantle. Ka kopo leka hape kapa u re romelle lengolo-tsoibila ka kotloloho.
form.subject: Sehlooho *

placeholders.name: Lebitso la hao
placeholders.subject: Re ka thusa ka eng?
placeholders.message: Re bolelle ka projeke ea hau kapa dipatlisiso ...

validation.email: Ka kopo kenya aterese ea lengolo-tsoibila e sebetsang.
validation.messageMinLength: Molaetsa o tlameha ho ba bonyane litlhaku tse {{count}} tse telele.

contact.reasonsTitle: Ke hobane'ng ha u lokela ho sebetsa le rona?
reasons: Tsebo e felletseng ea nts'etsopele ea software
AI / ML le litsebi tsa meralo ea leru
Nts'etsopele ea Agile e nang le puisano e hlakileng
Ts'ehetso ea nako e telele le tlhokomelo

custom.title: Litharollo tsa Tloaelo
custom.description: Na u batla tharollo e ikhethileng? Re sebetsa haufi-ufi le bareki ho utloisisa litlhoko tse ikhethang le ho fana ka software ea moetlo e tsamaisang liphetho tse ka lekanngoang.

faq.title: Na u na le lipotso tse ling?
faq.description: Sheba karolo ea rona ea FAQ bakeng sa likarabo tse potlakileng

hero.titlePrefix: Kopana le likelello tse ka morao
hero.description: Sehlopha se fapaneng sa litsebi tsa theknoloji, baqapi le litsebi tsa maano ba aha lihlahisoa tsa dijithale tse nang le tšusumetso e phahameng hammoho.

section.title: Sehlopha sa Boetapele
section.description: Baetapele ba nang le boiphihlelo ba tataisang pono le kholo ea Horizon Tech

hamza.bio: Moetapele ea nang le pono le moqapi oa mahlale ea nang le lilemo tse 10+ ho software ea khoebo, e ikhethang ho AI / ML, liforomo tsa leru le meralo ea lihlahisoa tse senyehang.

ahmet.role: Moqapi ea ka Sehloohong oa Ts'ireletso
ahmet.bio: Setsebi sa ts'ireletso ea ts'ireletso se shebile meralo ea ts'ireletso ea khoebo, meralo ea motheo e sireletsehileng ea sebaka, le phano ea pele ea ho latela maemo a laoloang.

culture.title: Bophelo ho Horizon Tech
culture.description: Re khothaletsa setso sa boqapi, tšebelisano-'moho le thuto e tsoelang pele

remoteFirst.title: Setso sa Pele
remoteFirst.description: Sebetsa kae kapa kae ka lihora tse feto-fetohang le ho tsepamisa maikutlo ho liphetho, eseng sebaka.

collaborative.title: Tikoloho ea tšebelisano 'moho
collaborative.description: Liketsahalo tsa sehlopha khafetsa, likopano tsa ho arolelana tsebo, le tšebelisano 'moho ea tšebelisano-'moho.

workLife.title: Ho leka-lekana ha mosebetsi le bophelo
workLife.description: Leano le fanang ka seatla se bulehileng la matsatsi a phomolo, tšehetso ea bophelo bo botle ba kelello le tlhompho ea nako ea botho.

innovation.title: Nako ea Boqapi
innovation.description: Nako ea 20% bakeng sa merero ea botho, li-hackathons le ho hlahloba mahlale a macha.

cta.title: Na u batla ho ikopanya le sehlopha sa rona?
cta.description: Re lula re batla batho ba nang le talenta ba tsotellang mesebetsi ea matsoho, beng le boqapi.

hero.description: Ikopanye le sehlopha sa baenjiniere ba hahang software ea morao-rao bakeng sa bareki ba lefats'e. Sebetsa hole, hola khafetsa, 'me u be le tšusumetso ea 'nete.

process.title: Ts'ebetso ea rona ea ho hira
process.description: E sebetsa hantle, e sebetsa hantle ebile e hlompha nako ea hau

steps.title: Etsa kopo
steps.description: Romella kopo ea hau 'me re tla e hlahloba nakong ea matsatsi a 3 a khoebo.

steps.title: Moqoqo oa Pele
steps.description: Mohala oa video oa metsotso e 30 ho buisana ka boiphihlelo ba hau le litebello tsa hau.

steps.title: Tekheniki
steps.description: Puisano ea tekheniki kapa boikoetliso bo sebetsang ho bonts'a bokhoni ba hau.

steps.title: Tlhahiso
steps.description: Kopana le sehlopha sa rona 'me u fumane tlhahiso ea hau ea ho kenela Horizon Tech.

jobs.title: Maemo a bulehileng
jobs.description: Fumana monyetla oa hau o latelang 'me u ikopanye le sehlopha sa rona se ntseng se hōla
jobs.unavailable: Ha ho na likopo tse amoheloang ka nako ena
jobs.noMatch: Ha u bone karolo e phethahetseng?

listings.title: Moenjiniere ea Phahameng oa Full-Stack
listings.description: Theha lits'ebetso tsa khoebo tse ka senyehang u sebelisa React, Node.js le theknoloji ea leru.

listings.title: Moenjiniere oa DevOps
listings.description: Rala le ho boloka lipeipi tsa CI / CD, meralo ea motheo e le khoutu le lits'ebetso tsa ho lekola.

listings.title: Moenjiniere oa AI / ML
listings.description: Theha mefuta ea ho ithuta ka mochini le tharollo ea AI bakeng sa bareki ba khoebo.

listings.title: Moqapi oa Lihlahisoa
listings.description: Theha boiphihlelo bo botle le bo hlakileng ba mosebelisi bakeng sa lits'ebetso tse rarahaneng tsa khoebo.

listings.title: Moqapi oa tharollo
listings.description: Theha tharollo ea tekheniki ea ho qetela le ho tataisa bareki ka phetoho ea dijithale.

listings.title: Sengoli sa Tekheniki
listings.description: Theha litokomane tse felletseng, li-tutorials le litaba tsa tekheniki.

cta.title: Lipotso mabapi le ho sebetsa mona?
cta.description: Re ka thabela ho utloa ho tsoa ho uena. Ka kopo ikopanye le rona 'me re tla araba lipotso life kapa life mabapi le bophelo ba Horizon Tech.

hero.description: Fumana hore na re thusitse lik'hamphani ho pholletsa le indasteri joang ho fetola ts'ebetso ka theknoloji e sebetsang, e nang le tšusumetso e phahameng.

items.title: Cloud Migration & Modernization
items.description: Fallisetsa litsamaiso tsa banka tsa lefa ho lisebelisoa tsa leru tsa AWS ntle le nako ea phomolo.
items.challenge: Legacy monolithic architecture causing scalability issues
items.result: Mokhoa oa ho fallela ka katleho ho li-microservices ho AWS

items.title: Sethala sa Diagnostic se tsamaisoang ke AI
items.description: E hahile mefuta ea ML bakeng sa tlhahlobo ea litšoantšo tsa bongaka ka ho nepahala ha 95% +.
items.challenge: Mekhoa ea tlhahlobo ea matsoho e nka nako e telele haholo
items.result: Tlhahlobo e ikemetseng ea AI / ML

items.title: Real-Time Analytics Dashboard
items.description: Nts'etsopele ea sethala sa BI se sebetsanang le liketsahalo tsa 10M + letsatsi le leng le le leng.
items.challenge: Ha ho na ponahalo ea nako ea 'nete ho metric ea bohlokoa ea khoebo
items.result: Sethala sa Real-Time Analytics le Insights

cta.title: Na u se u itokiselitse ho ngola pale ea hau ea katleho?
cta.description: A re ke re hlahlobeng hore na re ka u thusa joang ho fihlela liphetho tse tšoanang le ho hola ka boits'epo.

filters.title: Filter ea indasteri
filters.empty: Ha ho na lithuto tsa linyeoe tse lumellanang le filthara e khethiloeng ea indasteri.

hero.description: Lithuto tsa tekheniki, temohisiso ea indasteri, le lithuto tse sebetsang ho tsoa mosebetsing oa sebele oa ho tsamaisa.

featuredPost.title: Bokamoso ba Nts'etsopele ea Cloud-Native - Mekhoa eo u lokelang ho e shebella ka 2025
featuredPost.excerpt: Hlahloba mekhoa ea morao-rao ea nts'etsopele ea leru, ho tloha mehahong e se nang seva ho ea ho likhomphutha tsa bohale.

posts.title: Ho aha Scalable Microservices le Azure Kubernetes Service
posts.excerpt: Tataiso e sebetsang ea ho theha le ho tsamaisa li-microservices ho sebelisa AKS.

posts.title: Machine Learning in Production: Lessons Learned
posts.excerpt: Lithuto tse lekiloeng tšimong ho tsoa ho ho tsamaisa mehlala ea ML ka boholo.

posts.title: Karabo ea 19: Ke eng e ncha le hore na ke hobane'ng ha e le bohlokoa
posts.excerpt: Ho qoelisoa ka botebo ho likarolo tsa React 19 le litlamorao tsa ts'ebetso.

newsletter.title: Ingolise ho koranta ea rona
newsletter.description: Fumana lihlooho tsa morao-rao, lithupelo le tlhaiso-leseling tse fanoang beke le beke.
newsletter.note: Ha ho na spam. Ingolise nako efe kapa efe.

hero.title: Horizon Tech Engineering Blog
hero.description: Lintlha tsa tšimo le mekhoa e sebetsang ho tsoa ho lihlopha tse hahang lihlahisoa tsa AI, lits'ebetso tsa khoebo le liforomo tse tšepahalang tsa leru.

support.title: Setsi sa Ts'ehetso
support.subtitle: Fumana thuso ka lits'ebeletso tsa rona tsa nts'etsopele ea software

email.title: Tšehetso ea lengolo-tsoibila
email.description: Re romelle lengolo-tsoibila bakeng sa lipotso leha e le life

project.title: Lipotso tsa projeke
project.description: Buisana ka litlhoko tsa projeke ea hau

support.faqDescription: Likarabo tse potlakileng tsa lipotso tse tloaelehileng

faqs.question: Horizon Tech e fana ka lits'ebeletso life?
faqs.answer: Re fana ka nts'etsopele ea software ea moetlo, tharollo ea AI / ML, meralo ea leru, DevOps, bohlale ba khoebo le lits'ebeletso tsa IoT.

faqs.question: Ke qala projeke joang ka Horizon Tech?
faqs.answer: Ikopanye le rona ka foromo kapa lengolo-tsoibila ka litlhoko tsa hau. Re tla hlophisa mohala oa ho sibolla ebe re arolelana tlhahiso.

faqs.question: Na u fana ka tšehetso le ts'ehetso e tsoelang pele?
faqs.answer: E. Re fana ka liphutheloana tsa ts'ehetso le tlhokomelo tse kenyelletsang litokiso tsa likokoanyana, lintlafatso tsa ts'ireletso le lintlafatso tsa likarolo.

education.title: Lisebelisoa tsa tekheniki
education.subtitle: Litataiso, lithupelo le mekhoa e metle ho tsoa sehlopheng sa Horizon Tech

hub.title: Setsi sa ho Ithuta
hub.description: Hlahloba lisebelisoa tsa rona tsa tekheniki tse hlophisitsoeng ho pholletsa le leru, AI / ML, DevOps le nts'etsopele ea software ea sejoale-joale.
hub.note: Lisebelisoa tsena li ipapisitse le boiphihlelo ba 'nete ba projeke mme li ntlafatsoa khafetsa.
